violations.text: Veal parm, lentil soup, and meatballs packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026

The wall behind the mop sink area is constructed of drywall (covered with Styrofoam). This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Per PIC, test strips are ordered. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen/storefront area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2025

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025
Establishment is lacking proper drain plugs for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain drain plugs. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen/storefront area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025
The grout in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2026

The walls by the hand sink are constructed of drywall. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Per PIC, FRP will be put behind hand sinks. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025
